news.headline: Helios Technologies (HLIO) has made over 28 consecutive dividend payments.
news.summary: For more than 28 years, Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO) has maintained a remarkable record of consecutive dividend payments. The company, headquartered in Sarasota, Florida, has consistently distributed dividends to its shareholders without interruption for over two decades. This demonstrates the company's commitment to providing value to its investors and emphasizes its stability and financial strength.

news.headline: TEN Ltd. to release Q4 and 2024 year-end results on March 27, 2025 before market opens in New York.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Athens, Greece, TEN Ltd. ("TEN"), a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, disclosed its plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on the NYSE as "TEN," will make this announcement before the opening of the market in New York on Thursday, March 27, 2025.

news.headline: BioSurfaces and Morphocell Technologies partner to explore Bio-Spun™ material's therapeutic applications.
news.summary: In a recent collaboration, BioSurfaces, a prominent figure in advanced nanofiber materials, and Morphocell Technologies, a leading regenerative medicine firm, have teamed up to investigate the capabilities of BioSurfaces' exclusive Bio-Spun™ material. This partnership aims to leverage the unique properties of Bio-Spun™ for potential applications in the field of regenerative medicine. The venture between the two companies signifies a strategic move in the pursuit of innovative solutions, with BioSurfaces' cutting-edge material at the forefront. This joint initiative marks a significant step in the realm of advanced materials, potentially offering groundbreaking opportunities in the regenerative medicine sector.

news.headline: Blaize partners with Turbo Federal to accelerate AI solutions for US DoD; aim is to implement AI tech for federal use.
news.summary: Blaize Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:BZAI), a leading provider of AI-enabled edge computing solutions, based in El Dorado Hills, California, has revealed a significant partnership with Turbo Federal. Turbo Federal is a reputable provider of AI transformation services catering to various federal government agencies such as the Department of Justice (DoJ), Department of Defense (DoD), Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), and Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). The collaboration aims to assist Blaize in establishing connections within the federal sector, as well as identifying and implementing Blaize's advanced AI technology in federal use cases. This strategic move is geared towards supporting the adoption and testing of Blaize's innovative solutions within federal agencies.

news.headline: Battelle's DART wins top spot in DARPA Triage Challenge, excelling in identifying key injuries quickly.
news.summary: Battelle, based in Columbus, Ohio, emerged as the winner in a competition organized by DARPA focusing on advanced technologies for emergency responders. The key to victory in the DARPA Triage Challenge Event 1 was the rapid and precise identification of critical physiological indicators of injury-like hemorrhage and airway injuries. Battelle's innovative system, known as DART, claimed the first position in the Systems Competition, showcasing its effectiveness. Another group from Battelle, named CRI, also participated in the competition.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia QSR market projected to reach $16.62 billion by 2033 from $9.23 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 6.78%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Saudi Arabia Quick Service Restaurants market has been published, projecting significant growth. The market is anticipated to expand from US$ 9.23 billion in 2024 to US$ 16.62 billion by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.78% from 2025 to 2033. Factors attributed to this growth include changing customer preferences, the rise of the middle class, increased digitization, a thriving tourism sector, and a heightened focus on health consciousness.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% March 13 vs 4.33% March 12.
SharkNinja named Technology Company of the Year by Mass Technology Leadership Council in Needham, Massachusetts.
news.summary: A technology company based in Needham, Massachusetts, SharkNinja, was recently honored as the Technology Company of the Year by the Massachusetts Technology Leadership Council. This recognition highlights SharkNinja's achievements and contributions to the technology industry. The company's innovative work in the field has earned them this prestigious title, showcasing their dedication to excellence in the sector. The award signifies SharkNinja's significant impact and success, solidifying their position as a standout player in the technology landscape.

news.headline: French company discloses total voting rights and shares capital as of Feb 28, 2025. Capital: 106,862,404.20 euros. RCS Paris registration: 632 012 100.
news.summary: A French publicly traded company incorporated with a registered capital of €106,862,404.20, has its registered office located at 14 Rue Royale, 75008 Paris. The company is registered under the RCS Paris with the identifier 632 012 100 and possesses the Legal Entity Identifier 529900JI1GG6F7RKVI53.

news.headline: Hong Kong fintech sector experiences 250% growth in blockchain since 2022, with 1,100+ companies. Revenue set to hit $606B by 2032. Talent shortage and capital access are key concerns. Government policies boosting growth. China's "one country, two systems" policy benefiting innovation. HKMA's "Fintech 2025" strategy aims to establish financial hub status by 2025.
news.summary: Hong Kong's fintech ecosystem is thriving, with 1,100 fintech companies in the region, including 175 blockchain firms and 111 digital asset companies, showing significant growth since 2022. The sector is projected to reach a revenue of US$606 billion by 2032, with an annual growth rate of 28.5% from 2024 to 2032. Talent shortage (58.8%) and access to capital (43.9%) are top concerns. Over 73% of surveyed companies focus on AI, surpassing those in digital assets and cryptocurrencies. Hong Kong benefits from China's policy, boosting its Web3 innovations like licensing regimes and stablecoin initiatives. The HKMA aims to establish itself as a financial hub by 2025 through fintech integration, digital currency adoption, talent development, and supportive policies.

news.headline: Science Applications International Corp will report Q4 results on March 17. Earnings expected at $2.09/share and revenue of $1.81 billion. Shares closed at $104.26.
news.summary: Before the market opens on March 17, Science Applications International Corporation (NASDAQ:SAIC) is set to release its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts predict the Virginia-based company will post quarterly earnings of $2.09 per share, a notable increase from $1.43 per share in the same period last year. The company anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $1.81 billion, compared to $1.74 billion from the previous year. In a recent development, Science Applications International partnered with Defense Unicorns to enhance the delivery of secure and scalable software capabilities for the Department of Defense. The company's shares closed at $104.26 with a 0.4% decline on Thursday. For additional details and analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Stamford Health and Oula collaborate for midwife-led maternity and gynecology care in Connecticut.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on March 14, 2025, Stamford Health and Oula have announced a partnership to enhance maternity care services in the state. This collaboration integrates Oula's holistic midwife-led techniques for prenatal, birthing, and postnatal care with Stamford Health's renowned healthcare expertise. The initiative aims to provide state-of-the-art maternity services by leveraging Oula's holistic approach and Stamford Health's established reputation in the field.

news.headline: NYSE releases daily pre-market update for March 14, 2025, providing market insights before trading starts. Alison Kosik presents.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. This update includes valuable market insights from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors are encouraged to review the NYSE Pre-market update today before starting their trading activities. Alison Kosik presented the pre-market update on this date.

news.headline: Germany's Scholz: We are ready to free €3b for Ukraine when package passes.
Dreame unveils AI-driven robotic pool cleaners in NYC event on March 14, 2025, expanding smart home innovation.
news.summary: Dreame Technology is venturing into the pool care sector with advanced cleaning solutions powered by artificial intelligence. The company, known for its groundbreaking home products, recently organized a special event at The Peninsula Hotel NYC to showcase its latest offerings. The event, attended by editors and influencers, highlighted Dreame's commitment to revolutionizing the smart home industry with high-performance solutions. The date of the event was March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Dollar General beats Q4 sales expectations, with 4.5% growth to $10.304 billion. Plans to close 96 Dollar General stores and 45 pOpshelf stores. CEO mentions improved execution.
news.summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter sales, reporting a 4.5% year-on-year increase to $10.304 billion, surpassing the anticipated $10.264 billion. However, the EPS of $0.87 fell short of the projected $1.51. CEO Todd Vasos expressed satisfaction with the fourth-quarter business performance, citing enhanced execution and strong top-line outcomes. During the quarter, the company conducted a store portfolio evaluation, leading to the decision to shut down 96 Dollar General stores and 45 pOpshelf stores. Additionally, six pOpshelf stores will be converted to Dollar General stores.

news.headline: U.S. Gold Corp. will attend the 37th Annual ROTH Conference for Growth Companies in California. Nasdaq: USAU.
news.summary: U.S. Gold Corp., trading on the Nasdaq as USAU, will participate in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference for Growth Companies in Cheyenne, Wyoming on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Trump administration plans to increase Bitcoin reserves; aims for substantial accumulation in cost-neutral strategy. Key figures like Michael Saylor involved.
news.summary: A high-ranking representative from the White House revealed this week to leaders in the cryptocurrency industry that the Trump administration is looking to increase its Bitcoin holdings as part of a broader financial plan. Bo Hines, who leads the Presidential Working Group on Digital Assets, disclosed during a private meeting organized by the Bitcoin Policy Institute that the government aims to acquire a significant amount of Bitcoin. The meeting, which took place after a public event titled "Bitcoin for America," was attended by prominent figures in the sector, including Michael Saylor from Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), Fred Thiel from Marathon Digital (NASDAQ: MARA), Nathan McCauley from Anchorage Digital, and David Bailey from Bitcoin Magazine.

news.headline: German Conservatives' Merz: I expect vote to do these constitution amendments on Tuesday.
Israeli cabinet to convene on Saturday night to receive detailed report from Gaza ceasefire negotiating team and to decide on next steps for release of hostages - Axios.
Update: Mistake found in Aktia Bank Plc's 2024 Annual Review, affecting financial data.
MarketReach in NJ introduces Qualifying Program as add-on to appointment setting services, aims to enhance B2B prospecting.
news.summary: In Lawrenceville, New Jersey, on March 14, 2025, MarketReach, a prominent company offering B2B appointment setting and lead generation in central Jersey, has launched their Qualifying Program to enhance their appointment setting services. This program aims to improve the quality of leads generated by providing additional qualification criteria.

news.headline: German Conservatives' Merz: This will mobilise private capital; 500 bln euros over 12 years is nowhere near what we need for our infrastructure.
German Conservatives' Merz: Germany is back.
SUNation Energy retires $9.4 million in senior and junior secured debt by repaying accrued principal and interest fully.
news.summary: SUNation has completely paid off the total of $9.4 million in senior and junior secured loans, including all accrued principal and interest.

news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited invests $11,199.60 to extend business combination period by 1 month until April 13, 2025.
news.summary: A publicly traded special purpose acquisition company, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA), deposited $11,199.60 into its trust account in New York on March 12, 2025. This deposit aims to extend the timeline for completing a business combination for an additional month, from March 13 to April 13, 2025. The extension is intended to offer Inception Growth Acquisition Limited more time to finalize a business merger.

news.headline: Canadian Foreign Minister Joly: Canada wants to be closer to Europe and the UK.
German Conservatives' Merz: Climate and transformation fund will get 100 bln from the 500 bln Euro fund.
CleanLife® and ATX LED® debut innovative low-voltage DC lighting tech at 2025 IBS, impressing 124,000 industry professionals.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 14, 2025, CleanLife® and ATX LED® garnered attention at the 2025 NAHB International Builders' Show (IBS) by presenting innovative low-voltage DC lighting technology revolutionizing home construction. The event attracted around 124,000 industry professionals.

news.headline: Elegoo unveiling Jupiter 2 resin printer at RAPID + TCT 2025 in China, premier additive event in April.
news.summary: A new product from Elegoo, a fast-growing brand in global smart manufacturing, has been unveiled in Shenzhen, China on March 14, 2025. Jupiter 2, the newest addition to the Jupiter series resin lineup, is set to be showcased at RAPID + TCT 2025. This highly anticipated additive manufacturing event is scheduled for April of the same year. Elegoo continues to make waves in the industry with their innovative products, with Jupiter 2 being the latest offering. Stay tuned for the exciting launch of Jupiter 2 at this upcoming event.

news.headline: Lgmusicpub adds hit song "Phenomenal" with Snoop Dogg in publishing deal; Brian Elliott Smith involved.
news.summary: Atlanta, March 14, 2025 - Today, Lgmusicpub Publishing Agency Int'l LLC shared the exciting news of their recent signing of the hit song "Phenomenal" produced by Brian Elliott Smith, the CEO of 804 Music / Bard Up Entertainment. This exclusive agreement marks a significant milestone for the Virginia-based record producer and showcases the talent and creativity behind the track. "Phenomenal" is set to make waves in the music industry with its unique sound and fresh approach, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

news.headline: Rep. Donalds proposes bill to secure Trump's Bitcoin reserve, preventing dismantling via executive action. At least 23 states support.
news.summary: The article discusses a new bill to solidify President Trump's executive order establishing a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, utilizing Bitcoin seized in criminal cases to create a national reserve. The legislation introduced by US Representative Donalds aims to make the reserve permanent to prevent future administrations from dismantling it. 23 US states have also proposed similar legislation. The bill requires 60 Senate votes and a House majority to pass. This move signifies the increasing acceptance and integration of cryptocurrency into US financial policy. The bill could provide clarity for Bitcoin acquisition strategies and regulatory approaches in the future, although challenges such as funding and custody solutions need to be addressed. The bill may promote a more unified regulatory approach benefiting businesses and investors in the crypto space.

German Conservatives' Merz: The special fund of €500 bln over 12 years to be created, of which €100 bln to be spent by states.
German Conservatives' Merz: Germany's states will get to spend some 16 bln euros extra through debt finance.
Germany's Merz: Special fund for infrastructure of €500 billion.
Germany's Merz: CDU, SPD, Greens reached a deal on fiscal package.
German Conservatives' Merz: Spending on civil protection, IT security, intelligence, aid to illegally attacked states will be exempt from debt brake beyond 1% of GDP as part of defence spending.
Germany's Merz: Discussions were challenging, the result is acceptable for all.
Canada Foreign Minister Joli: I have been working with Europeans to exchange information on US tariffs.
Champion Safe's 2025 Triumph Series gains dealer interest due to advanced security upgrades, released in January.
news.summary: In Provo, UT, on March 14, 2025, the 2025 Triumph Series by Champion Safe Company, a top manufacturer of premium safes and a wholly-owned subsidiary of American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), has been attracting significant attention from dealers following its debut in January. The latest upgrades have distinguished it from other high-security safes, leading to strong interest from retailers. Renowned for its top-notch security and fire protection, the Triumph Series has been further fortified with key feature improvements, solidifying its standing in the market.

news.headline: New PostalAnnex location in Ontario, CA; Annex Brands expands franchise footprint; opened on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: Annex Brands, Inc. is further extending its reach in the packing, shipping, and office services franchise sector with the recent inauguration of a new location. As a key player in this industry, Annex Brands, Inc. continues to solidify its position as a top franchisor. The latest addition marks another milestone for the company in expanding its footprint, demonstrating its commitment to growth and customer service. This development showcases Annex Brands, Inc.'s dedication to enhancing its network, with this newest branch being a testament to its success.

news.headline: MAC Dental Center in De Pere, WI, opens new facility after merging two locations; now operating in state-of-the-art building.
news.summary: In De Pere, Wisconsin, on March 14, 2025, MAC Dental Center, a reputable dental provider, has exciting news to share - they have relocated to a cutting-edge facility. By combining two existing sites, the practice has consolidated into a single location, enhancing their services and convenience for patients.

news.headline: SAIC to report Q4 results with estimated earnings of $2.09/share and revenue of $1.81 billion. Offers 1.42% dividend yield.
news.summary: On Monday, March 17, Science Applications International Corporation (NASDAQ: SAIC) is set to announce its Q4 financial results. Analysts predict earnings to be $2.09 per share, higher than the $1.43 per share reported last year. The company anticipates revenue of $1.81 billion for the quarter compared to $1.74 billion a year ago. SAIC's current annual dividend yield stands at 1.42%, with a quarterly payout of 37 cents per share ($1.48 annually). Investors are considering leveraging this dividend yield for potential gains amidst the recent interest in SAIC. For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Rumble sets Q4 & FY 2024 earnings release & conference call. Also, investor conference participation scheduled.
news.summary: The latest report reveals concerning information about the impact of the recent natural disaster in the region. The disaster has left over 10,000 people displaced from their homes and in need of urgent assistance. The death toll has risen to 50, with many more injured and missing. The government has allocated $5 million in emergency funds for rescue and relief efforts. Rescue teams are working tirelessly to search for survivors and provide necessary aid. The situation remains critical, with infrastructure severely damaged and access to basic necessities limited. The community is urged to come together and support those affected by this tragedy.

news.headline: NATO head: Russia ties should mend post-war.
Capstone Companies and Coppermine Ventures agree on a strategic collaboration for an online customer registration app.
news.summary: Capstone Companies, Inc. disclosed their latest partnership with Coppermine Ventures, LLC, a private Maryland company known for running health, fitness, and social activities facilities in Maryland. The companies signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to outline their collaboration in creating an online customer registration and management application. Capstone, listed on OTCQB as CAPC, and Coppermine Ventures aim to develop this Application, intending to enhance customer experience for the Maryland-based company. The MOU signifies their commitment to plan and execute this project.

news.headline: Brag House celebrates with Nasdaq closing bell ring after IPO success, shares priced at $4 each, targeting Gen Z gamers.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Brag House Holdings, Inc. disclosed that Lavell Juan and Daniel Leibovich, the co-founders and executives of the Company, are set to ring the Nasdaq closing bell on March 17, 2025, at the Nasdaq MarketSite in Times Square, NYC. Brag House is a renowned media technology platform targeting casual college gamers and brands aiming to engage with the Gen Z demographic. The Company recently completed a prosperous initial public offering of common stock priced at $4 per share.

news.headline: Polyrizon signs LOI with psychedelic company to develop intranasal formulation for treatments, Nasdaq: PLRZ.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Raanana, Israel, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), a biotech company in development stages specializing in innovative intranasal hydrogels, revealed a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) agreement with a psychedelic-derived therapeutics-focused biotech company. The LOI aims to collaborate in crafting a new intranasal formulation for treatment purposes.

news.headline: Surf Bio appoints Doug Hecker as Head of Technical Operations, bringing 30+ years of CMC expertise to advance biologic delivery.
news.summary: With over 30 years of experience in CMC (Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls), Doug Hecker has joined Surf Bio in Palo Alto, California. Surf Bio focuses on improving the delivery of antibodies and biologics. Doug Hecker's appointment as Head of the company comes as a strategic move to leverage his expertise in this field. The company aims to enhance the delivery of high-concentration biologics under his leadership. This announcement was made on March 14, 2025.
